description: You are a transportation planner at the City of Bologna's mobility department. Generate synthetic GPS trajectory data (Floating Car Data) from the Pasubio corridor microsimulation for calibrating a real-time travel time estimation algorithm. Using the existing configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg as a template, create a new configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_fcd.sumocfg that retains all original input and report settings, sets the simulation time from 0 to 500, and configures FCD output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_fcd.xml (with a 1.0 second period) and tripinfo output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos.xml. Run the simulation in headless mode to generate these output files.
